summary: Iteration 106 testing complete. All Settings API endpoints working correctly. Settings page renders with all 4 tabs (Profile, Notifications, Integrations, Account). Email design system and scheduler modules verified to exist with correct exports.

minor.issue: Endpoint not implemented - returns 404. Frontend has change password form but backend endpoint missing.

action_items: Implement POST /api/auth/change-password endpoint to support the Account tab's Change Password form
critical_code_review_comments: Change password endpoint missing in auth.ts - frontend form exists but backend returns 404
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully functional with 4 tabs. Backend APIs for GET/PATCH /api/settings working. Change password endpoint not implemented. Scheduler module exists and exports startScheduler. Email design system exports all required functions (buildEmailTemplate, highlightBox, successBox, warningBox, errorBox, infoBox, cardBlock, detailRow, statRow, formatCurrency, formatDate, formatDateShort). All 16+ new email functions exist in email.ts.

backend: GET /api/settings returns user settings with weeklyReportEnabled, staleLeadEmailEnabled, quoteNudgeEmailEnabled fields
PATCH /api/settings saves notification preferences (weeklyReportEnabled, staleLeadEmailEnabled, quoteNudgeEmailEnabled)
PATCH /api/settings saves profile fields (firstName, businessName, primaryIndustry)
frontend: Profile tab shows Display Name, Business Name, Industry selector, Email, Save Changes button
Notifications tab shows 3 toggles: Weekly report, Stale lead reminders, Quote viewed nudge
Integrations tab shows Google Calendar status with Connect button
Account tab shows Change Password form and Danger Zone
